tools.name: screen_us_finviz
tools.description:
Screen US-listed stocks (NYSE/NASDAQ/AMEX) via Finviz with 100+ filters.

Args:
    criteria: dict of Finviz filter codes (e.g. {"cap": "large", "sec": "technology"}).
              Accepts {"screenerUrl": "<full finviz url>"} for pre-built screens,
              or {"market_cap_min": 1e10, "sector"

tools.name: screen_china_a_shares
tools.description:
Screen Mainland China A-shares (Shanghai + Shenzhen) via Eastmoney data.

Args:
    sector: optional sector filter (e.g. "Banking", "Pharmaceuticals", "EV")
    market_cap_min: minimum market cap in CNY
    limit: max rows to return (default 50)

tools.name: screen_china_star_market
tools.description:
Screen China's STAR Market (Shanghai Sci-Tech Innovation Board) — Chinese hard-tech & biotech IPOs.

Args:
    criteria: dict of filters (e.g. {"sector": "Semiconductors", "marketCapMin": 1e10})
    limit: max rows to return

tools.name: screen_china_chinext
tools.description:
Screen ChiNext (Shenzhen growth board) — China's Nasdaq-equivalent for growth companies.

Args:
    criteria: filter dict (sector, market cap, P/E, etc.)
    limit: max rows to return

tools.name: screen_china_bse
tools.description:
Screen the Beijing Stock Exchange (BSE) — China's small-and-medium-enterprise (SME) board.

    limit: max rows to return

tools.name: screen_chinese_adrs
tools.description:

Args:
    criteria: filter dict (sector, market cap, P/E, etc.)
    limit: max rows to return
